name: CM Punk (Mutiny)
description:
(Potential spoilers for 2k25 myrise)

Betrayal is bittersweet, but it had to be done.

------------>

Okay so I finally got 2k25.. All I have to say is what the hell CM Punk. Like I know it's a fictional Punk.. BUT that broke my damn heart 💔 and then he has the audacity to look at me like I did it.

And the second time around when I was doing different options, I stripped the counterpart of everything Bray. Bro can't do that and think I'll let him keep the Bray
creator: Flamesheart
